title: Zombie Cloth
description: Inspired by better than adventure, made in MCreator, this is my first mod so don't expect the best.
body:
Well its fairly simple, 

This mod adds cloth, a new drop from zombies. You will notice that the original 3 wool and wood recipe for beds have been tweaked a bit to include cloth this provides a more challenging early game experience for players so they cannot just sleep away the first night. 

 ![New Bed Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e002c4f812bc3ae0e191bc9c4707051934d4cc0.png)


Inspired by better than adventure, made in MCreator, this is my first mod so don't expect the best.
